chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5266 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.23323/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 29.04.2025 Mr. Hamza Waheed, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Additional Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Shamshad Ahmed, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the respondent, which is taken on record. It is jointly submitted that this petition is squarely covered by judgment of this court rendered in the case of Pakistan International Freight of Forwarders Association vs. Province of Sindh, reported as 2017 PTD 1 and Pakistan Mobile Communication Limited vs. Federation of Pakistan reported as 2022 PTD 266. Learned counsel for the petitioner relies upon another order of Division Bench of this court, dated 16.11.2023 passed in CP D 1318 of 2023 [OOCL Pakistan (Private) Limited vs. Sindh & Others] and states that since fate of judgments cited supra are in appeal before the honourable Supreme Court, therefore, it may be just and proper for the petitions to be disposed of with directions to the respondent not to proceed further with impugned notices till the matter is finally decided by the honourable Supreme Court and thereafter the parties may proceed in accordance with law. The learned counsel for the respondent present articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
